name: Dream Extraction Game Product
description: A co-op extraction roguelite built around unstable dream zones, memory shards, and timed escape.
pitch: Players enter unstable dream zones, recover memory shards, and escape before the zone collapses.
playerFantasy: A small squad survives surreal danger by making tense extraction choices together.
targetAudience: Co-op action players who enjoy roguelite progression and high-pressure extraction sessions.
